overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rolling grasslands. The character encounters horse-drawn carriages while traversing the scenic prairie with distant mountains visible under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through tall grass toward a rocky hill formation

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through the prairie grass
large rock formation atop a grassy hill
single large tree standing on the hilltop
expansive fields of tall green grass and wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone along a dirt trail through an expansive prairie landscape. A rocky hill with a solitary tree dominates the distant view while tall grass sways in the breeze on either side of the path.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with white horses enters from the right and overtakes the character

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the trail as a carriage passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white horses overtaking the character and moving ahead on the trail

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn carriage suddenly enters from the right, overtaking the character and continuing down the trail ahead. The prairie landscape remains consistent with the rocky hill still visible in the distance.

events.description: covered wagon becomes visible ahead stationary on the trail
character walks past the stationary covered wagon on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail approaching and passing a covered wagon while navigating around it

notable_agents.action: stationary covered wagon with canvas top blocking part of the trail ahead

entered.detail: canvas-covered wagon with wooden frame parked on the trail
broken wooden cart debris lying in the grass beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stationary covered wagon blocking the trail ahead. An abandoned broken cart lies in the grass to the left. The character passes the wagon on the right as the rocky hill formation disappears behind and the solitary tree shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic prairie overlook with mountain views

events.description: character slows slightly and turns to face the expansive mountain vista on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail while admiring the expansive mountain scenery and open landscape

entered.detail: distant rocky mountain peaks with forested slopes becoming visible

segments.scene_description: After passing the covered wagon, the trail opens up to reveal a breathtaking view of distant mountain ranges on the left. The character continues walking along the path, occasionally turning to take in the scenic vista while the solitary tree remains visible on the right and the prairie stretches out toward the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that evolves from a solitary trek through the prairie into a sweeping vista of distant mountains. It begins with the character walking through expansive grasslands where tall grass sways beside the path and a rocky hill with a solitary tree anchors the distant horizon. As the journey continues, a horse-drawn carriage suddenly overtakes the character from the right before the path becomes obstructed by a stationary covered wagon and a broken cart lying in the grass. The scene then shifts as the character bypasses the wagon, causing the rocky hill to disappear behind them while the solitary tree moves to the right of the frame. Finally, the trail opens up to reveal a breathtaking view of mountain ranges on the left, with the character continuing forward across the stretching prairie toward the horizon.
